items.title: Iran war live updates: Israel bolsters forces in southern Lebanon, drones hit U.S. embassy in Riyadh as oil rises further; dollar strengthens
items.description: Follow the latest news after the U.S. and Israel launched a massive attack on Iran that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

items.title: Five races to watch on the day the 2026 midterm elections kick off
items.description: Results from Tuesday's races in three states could be telling for how the rest of the midterm season will unfold.

items.title: U.S. embassy in Riyadh hit by drones
items.description: This was CNBC's live coverage of the U.S.-Israel strikes in Iran on March 2.

items.title: Supreme Court bars redrawing only Republican-held NYC congressional district for 2026 election
items.description: The Supreme Court ruling is a potentially significant one for Republicans, who are trying to retain their majorities in both chambers of Congress.

items.title: Next phase of Iran war ‘will be even more punishing’: Rubio, Trump officials brief Congress
items.description: Members of Congress demanded briefings from the White House after attacks were launched on Iran over the weekend.
